text_block_list.text:
Heya, you pretty little thing with the glasses.
Whaddya say we hang out a li'l, just you and me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Sure. This is a great stopping point, so I don't
mind... Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ah, so you knew it was me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Well... I'm rather used to the sound of your voice.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I guess you would be. Anyway, what did
you mean about this being a good place to stop?
Were you doing something?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I just finished making a few rounds and
spending time with different people.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's why it's all my fault that poor girl's cleats
got messed up...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm. From the looks of them, they should still be
usable with a few repairs. Please don't worry.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, there is a concrete reason for what
happened. As long as we stay calm and eliminate
the cause, this "misfortune" you speak of will not
occur again.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno! Ikuno! I want one of those drinks I was
talking about!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we drop by the shop, then? We bought
a lot of snacks today, though, so let's limit
ourselves to the regular size.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
This wind blowing by feels like no other... What a
mysterious place this is.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe somewhere like this is located
so near the academy.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I highly recommend everyone come here to
enjoy the wind. You know, people always seem to
lose track of me whenever we come here for
walks.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
You're the only one who's managed to stay with
me all the way.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I could hardly lose sight of you, seeing as it's just
the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Well, aren't you reliable as ever!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I'm glad people find me so dependable.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to maintain my breadth of knowledge and
consideration so that I can continue to be helpful
to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, sounds like you're going to become even
more reliable than ever! Or at least, I'd like to say
that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But I'm not sure if that's entirely right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It is true that you're knowledgeable and considerate...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I think people simply like you because of how
present you are when you're with them.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: They... like me?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
In that case... I also like everyone because of all
the different experiences I get to have when I'm
with them.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
By the way, are you here because you needed
something from me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I wanted to ask if you'd like to run with
me a bit.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'd be happy to. I could hardly refuse a
request from someone who likes me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, you... You really are Little Miss Dependable.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Keep increasing your speed, just like
you're trying to surge ahead!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature runs while taking in Ikuno Dictus's
advice. Even those watching from the sidelines
are able to learn from their pair run.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We're just getting started! I'll run with you as
many times as you want!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I know I said I'd run with you as many times as you
wanted, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
We've gone and completely exhausted ourselves,
haven't we?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I didn't want to disappoint you, and before
I knew it... Well... here we are now.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Being considerate toward other people's wants
and needs is important, but... I can't forget to
pace myself either.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again... And thanks, Ikuno. I'm
grateful for how hard you pushed yourself for me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Of course.
